ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasonal_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season (e.g., April/May 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "weekly_rate" TEXT /* Weekly room rate */,
  "monthly_rate" TEXT /* Monthly room rate */,
  "nightly_rate" TEXT /* Nightly room rate */,
  "week_night_rate" TEXT /* Room rate for week nights */,
  "weekend_night_rate" TEXT /* Room rate for weekend nights */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum stay requirement */,
  "is_weekend_rate_inclusive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the weekend rate is included in the nightly rate */,
  "is_minimum_stay_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a minimum stay requirement is enforced */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Room number */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number where the room is located */,
  "room_view" TEXT /* View from the room (e.g., ocean, garden) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum occupancy of the room */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the room (e.g., available, occupied, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the room details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seasonal rate applied */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount charged for the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the booking details */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of cancellation, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES seasonal_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guest */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the guest */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the guest details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the payment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room assignment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the room is assigned to */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the room assignment (e.g., pending, confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the room was assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the room assignment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the room assignment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_assignments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the revenue is generated from */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue (e.g., room booking, additional services) */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revenue entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the revenue entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the occupancy rate is for */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms available */,
  "occupied_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms occupied */,
  "occupancy_rate" TEXT /* Occupancy rate (percentage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occupancy entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the occupancy entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest the demographic information is for */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the guest */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the guest */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of origin of the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic information was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_demographics_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)
